"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\modbus_master.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\modbus_master.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\modbus_master.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\modbus_master.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o modbus_master.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmodbus_master.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\modbus_master.dir\linkLibs.rsp
